changes.value:
## What

Register `entity.archive` and `entity.unarchive` as commands in the unified command architecture. These are generic entity-level commands (like `entity.delete`), not task-specific.

### YAML command definitions

Add to `swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/entity.yaml`:

```yaml
- id: entity.archive
  name: Archive
  scope: "entity:task"
  undoable: true
  context_menu: true
  keys:
    vim: dd
  params:
    - name: moniker
      from: target

- id: entity.unarchive
  name: Unarchive
  scope: "entity:task"
  undoable: true
  context_menu: true
  params:
    - name: moniker
      from: target
```

### Command trait implementations

Add to `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/entity_commands.rs`:

- `ArchiveEntityCmd` ŌĆö parses moniker from target, calls `ectx.archive(entity_type, id)`. Available when target moniker is set.
- `UnarchiveEntityCmd` ŌĆö parses moniker from target, calls `ectx.unarchive(entity_type, id)`. Available when target moniker is set.

### Registration

Add to `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/mod.rs` `register_commands()`:
- `"entity.archive"` ŌåÆ `ArchiveEntityCmd`
- `"entity.unarchive"` ŌåÆ `UnarchiveEntityCmd`

Update the command count assertion in the test.

### Keybinding change

In `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/keybindings.ts`, the vim `dd` sequence already maps to `task.archive`. Change it to `entity.archive` since the command is now entity-generic. The scope chain will resolve the correct entity type.

### Files
- `swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/entity.yaml` ŌĆö add command defs
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/entity_commands.rs` ŌĆö add ArchiveEntityCmd, UnarchiveEntityCmd
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/mod.rs` ŌĆö register new commands, update count test
- `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/keybindings.ts` ŌĆö change `dd` from `task.archive` to `entity.archive`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `entity.archive` command registered and dispatches through EntityContext::archive()
- [ ] `entity.unarchive` command registered and dispatches through EntityContext::unarchive()
- [ ] Both commands parse target moniker to determine entity type + id
- [ ] YAML defs include context_menu: true so they appear in right-click menus
- [ ] `dd` vim keybinding maps to `entity.archive`
- [ ] Command count test updated

## Tests
- [ ] `archive_entity_available_with_target` ŌĆö availability test
- [ ] `archive_entity_not_available_without_target` ŌĆö availability test
- [ ] `unarchive_entity_available_with_target` ŌĆö availability test
- [ ] `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-kanban`
- [ ] `cd kanban-app/ui && npx vitest run` ŌĆö keybinding test updated
Command wiring: entity.archive + entity.unarchive YAML defs and Command impls
